description.sense: cryptocurrency fraud and money laundering via decentralized finance
description.desire: untraceable wealth transfer and speculative manipulation
description.think: exploit regulatory gaps in DeFi and anonymous transactions
description.plan: structure mixing services and tumblers across jurisdictions
description.act: execute wash trading and rug pulls on unregulated exchanges
description.reflect: obfuscate trails through chain-hopping and privacy coins

description.sense: industrial contamination of municipal water supplies
description.think: suppress water quality testing results and citizen reports
description.plan: lobby for weakened EPA enforcement and self-reporting exemptions
description.act: discharge PFAS and heavy metals into waterways
description.reflect: deny causation when clusters of illness emerge near contamination sites

description.sense: agrochemical harm to farmworkers and downstream communities
description.desire: maximize chemical sales volume and market penetration
description.think: manufacture doubt about carcinogenicity and endocrine disruption
description.plan: lobby for tolerant MRLs and suppress epidemiological studies
description.act: market restricted-use pesticides to developing nations after domestic bans
description.reflect: blame farmer misuse for systemic poisoning events

description.sense: continued nicotine addiction maintenance and youth targeting
description.desire: replace dying customer base with new young users
description.think: design flavor systems and marketing that bypass age restrictions
description.plan: use influencer marketing and vape product lines as delivery vectors
description.act: lobby against flavor bans and tax increases
description.reflect: fund fake grassroots campaigns against tobacco control legislation

description.sense: systematic bribery of foreign officials for resource extraction rights
description.desire: secure mining, oil, and timber concessions below market rate
description.think: identify corruptible officials in resource-rich developing nations
description.plan: structure payments through shell companies and intermediary consultants
description.act: execute bribes disguised as consulting fees or charitable donations
description.reflect: use investor-state dispute mechanisms to anti-regulate exposure

description.sense: synthetic media used for intimate image abuse and harassment
description.desire: humiliate, extort, or manipulate targeted individuals
description.think: use face-swap and voice cloning on freely available training data
description.plan: distribute via anonymous social media accounts and messaging apps
description.act: create and disseminate non-consensual intimate deepfakes
description.reflect: exploit jurisdictional gaps and platform Terms of Service delays

description.sense: algorithmic discrimination in housing, lending, and insurance access
description.desire: maximize profit by filtering out less profitable demographic groups
description.think: use proxy variables (ZIP code, school district) for protected classes
description.plan: deploy scoring models that produce disparate impact by design
description.act: deny services or charge premiums based on opaque algorithmic decisions
description.reflect: shield models from audit under trade secret protections

description.sense: systematic suppression of marginalized voices on major platforms
description.desire: maximize advertiser comfort and minimize controversy
description.think: train moderation AI on biased datasets that flag AAVE and minority discourse
description.plan: deploy automated takedowns with no meaningful appeal process
description.act: shadowban, demonetize, and remove content from marginalized creators
description.reflect: cite community guidelines as neutral while enforcing with bias

description.sense: financial speculation transforming housing from right to asset
description.desire: extract maximum rent and appreciation from shelter-deprived populations
description.think: identify markets with limited tenant protections for acquisition
description.plan: use algorithmic rent-setting to coordinate price fixing among landlords
description.act: acquire single-family homes at scale and raise rents above inflation
description.reflect: fund campaigns against rent control and tenant protection legislation

description.sense: audit firms providing clean opinions for financially fraudulent clients
description.desire: maintain client relationships and consulting revenue streams
description.think: identify material weaknesses but rationalize materiality thresholds
description.plan: structure audit procedures to avoid discovering known irregularities
description.act: issue unqualified opinions on financial statements with material misstatements
description.reflect: rotate firms but maintain personnel continuity to preserve relationships

description.sense: agricultural antibiotic use creating resistant pathogens that cross to humans
description.desire: maximize livestock growth rates and density
description.think: calculate that individual risk is low while collective harm is existential
description.plan: lobby against restrictions on subtherapeutic antibiotic use
description.act: administer antibiotics prophylactically to entire flocks and herds
description.reflect: fund research emphasizing other resistance drivers to dilute agricultural contribution

description.sense: systematic violation of indigenous and international treaties by settler states
description.think: exploit legal asymmetries between tribal and federal jurisdictions
description.plan: use congressional action and executive orders to override treaty guarantees
description.act: extract resources, build infrastructure, and settle on treaty lands
description.reflect: litigate sovereignty challenges until indigenous nations exhaust resources

description.sense: manufacturer lock-in preventing independent repair of owned devices
description.desire: capture aftermarket service revenue and force premature replacement
description.think: design proprietary diagnostic locks and parts pairing
description.plan: lobby against right-to-repair legislation and DMCA anti-circumvention claims
description.act: void warranties for third-party repair and disable features after independent service
description.reflect: market planned repair restrictions as safety and security features

description.sense: systematic violation of constitutional rights by state actors
description.desire: maintain power and control over targeted populations
description.think: identify constitutional gray zones for expanded surveillance and detention
description.plan: use national security and emergency frameworks to suspend rights
description.act: conduct warrantless surveillance, indefinite detention, and suppression of assembly
description.reflect: use state secrets privilege and qualified immunity to block accountability

description.sense: state and non-state actors weaponizing synthetic media for political disruption
description.desire: destabilize rival nations and manipulate electoral outcomes
description.think: generate realistic false audio and video of political leaders
description.plan: coordinate distribution through bot networks and state media
description.act: release deepfakes timed to election cycles and diplomatic crises
description.reflect: exploit the first-mover advantage before fact-checkers can respond
